cards.name: Arcane Signet
cards.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

cards.name: Sol Ring
cards.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.

cards.name: Impulse Study
cards.oracle_text: Draw two cards.

cards.name: Counterflux Copy
cards.oracle_text: Counter target spell.

cards.name: Surgical Answer
cards.oracle_text: Exile target creature.

cards.name: Aether Reset
cards.oracle_text: Return all creatures to their owner's hand.

cards.name: Mystical Tutor
cards.oracle_text: Search your library for an instant or sorcery card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top.

cards.name: Heroic Intervention
cards.oracle_text: Permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

cards.name: Comet Closer
cards.oracle_text: Each opponent loses 10 life.

cards.name: Treasure Feed
cards.oracle_text: Create two Treasure tokens.

cards.name: Village Rites
cards.oracle_text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Draw two cards.

cards.name: Diabolic Intent
cards.oracle_text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Search your library for a card, put that card into your hand, then shuffle.

cards.name: Plague Crafter
cards.oracle_text: When this creature enters the battlefield, each player sacrifices a creature.

cards.name: Blood Artist Echo
cards.oracle_text: Whenever a creature dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

cards.name: Toxic Deluge
cards.oracle_text: All creatures get -X/-X until end of turn.

cards.name: Malakir Rebirth
cards.oracle_text: Until end of turn, target creature gains 'When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control.'

cards.name: Gray Merchant Echo
cards.oracle_text: When this creature enters the battlefield, each opponent loses life equal to your devotion to black.

cards.name: Sol Ring
cards.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.

cards.name: Sword of Testing
cards.oracle_text: Equipped creature gets +2/+2. Equip {2}.

cards.name: Shielding Aura
cards.oracle_text: Enchant creature. Enchanted creature has hexproof.

cards.name: Protection Burst
cards.oracle_text: Target creature phases out.

cards.name: Swords to Plowshares
cards.oracle_text: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.

cards.name: Austere Command Copy
cards.oracle_text: Choose two — Destroy all artifacts; destroy all enchantments; destroy all creatures with mana value 3 or less; and destroy all creatures with mana value 4 or greater.

cards.name: Finale of Devastation
cards.oracle_text: Search your library and/or graveyard for a creature card with mana value X or less and put it onto the battlefield. If X is 10 or more, creatures you control get +X/+X and gain haste until end of turn.
